title: Ontology Intent Mappings (intent-mappings.json)
description: Schema for deterministic concept_uri to intent_class mappings with confidence floors.

schema_version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Must be 1.0 for ADR-025.

domain.description: Domain name. Must match pack.json domain.

mappings.description: Ordered concept to canonical intent mappings.

concept_uri.description: Concept URI that MUST exist in vocab.skos.jsonld @id entries.

intent_class.description: Canonical dotted intent class ending with a version segment (e.g. payments.card.authorize.v1).

confidence_floor.description: Minimum confidence threshold in [0,1] for mapping eligibility.
